value.found_quote: Utilizing a fully managed Agent Runtime to deploy and scale agents efficiently without the need to manage underlying infrastructure, ensuring reliable performance with built-in observability.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Agent Runtime as a fully managed runtime that deploys and scales agents without requiring customers to manage underlying infrastructure, which directly matches the claim. The page also clearly states at the top: "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'", indicating the offering is in preview/pre-GA status rather than generally available.
